hypothesis: In tri-gas ICP etching of PMMA with Ar/O2/N2, augmenting the frozen single-gas–encoder GraphSAGE with physically informed pairwise edge features (e.g., differences in electron affinity and estimated dominant reaction rate constants) will increase out-of-distribution etch-rate prediction accuracy by ≥0.05 absolute R2 compared to a composition-only GraphSAGE on a Testgrid-style split when trained on ≤10% of the available mixture PBM data.
